summary: The test suite demonstrates an excellent implementation of the complex 'test-via-act' requirement. It properly manages a temporary Git environment to trigger GitHub Actions locally and captures the results into the required artifact. Coverage is comprehensive, including functional matrix logic (axes, include/exclude, limits) and structural/syntax validation (actionlint, shellcheck). The design is efficient, using a single act run for multiple scenarios to respect the execution limit while still asserting on exact values.
